behavior_in_task_description.reason: instruction.md names packages/eslint-plugin-react-hooks/package.json and describes ESLint 10 peer dep requirement; tests check peerDependencies.eslint for ^10.0.0 which is clearly derivable.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes the problem (peer dep doesn't include v10) but doesn't give the exact string to add.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: test_v10_uses_or_separator asserts literal '|| ^10.0.0' substring, forcing a specific formatting (space before ^10.0.0); a valid alternative like '||^10.0.0' or restructuring with '>=3.0.0 <11' would fail.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests parse JSON, run yarn build/jest, run lint scripts, and check license - not just text grep.

test_not_tautological.reason: f2p tests require actual presence of ^10.0.0 in the peerDependencies eslint range; a stub can't pass.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Tests verify ESLint 10 added, backward compat preserved, and repo-level checks pass.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests grouped with section comments (Gates, Fail-to-pass, Pass-to-pass) and docstrings.

structured_data_schema.reason: package.json schema is standard npm; peerDependencies.eslint key is implicit and test-checked.

no_typos.reason: test_package_structure_intact uses f-string with bare identifier 'name' instead of '"name"' or pkg.get("name") in the error message: f"name wrong: {pkg.get(name)}" — this will NameError if the assertion fails.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction points at package.json which is the natural file for peer dep config, not overly specific (e.g., no line numbers).

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: Gold patch is a single-line change to peerDependencies.eslint.
